title: cleome macrophylla var. maculatiflora
intro: Cleome macrophylla var. maculatiflora, also known as spotted bee plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cleomaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cleome macrophylla var. maculatiflora include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
